name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: In Phoenix, AZ at 6402 S Central Ave, ACE Cash Express provides quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
Located at 6402 S Central Ave in Phoenix, AZ, this ACE Cash Express is a standalone storefront serving the local community. The location is open Monday through Saturday, with hours from 9 AM to 7 PM on weekdays (extended to 8 PM on Friday) and 9 AM to 6 PM on Saturday. You'll find convenient access to payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services right here in central Phoenix.

At the Phoenix ACE Cash Express on S Central Ave, customers can apply for payday loans, title-backed loans, and check cashing services. Call 602-243-7588 to speak with a representative about your borrowing needs, loan terms, or to ask questions about required documents. The staff at this Phoenix location can provide quick processing and help you understand your options.

This Phoenix payday loan location is ideal when you need fast cash between paychecks or want to leverage a vehicle title for a larger loan. Bring a valid government ID, proof of income (pay stubs or bank statements), and information about your vehicle if applying for a title loan. ACE Cash Express helps Phoenix residents access financing when they need it most.
pros: Multiple service offerings under one brand (loans, check cashing, money transfers, tax services, bill payments)
Physical store locations provide in-person service for customers preferring face-to-face transactions
Same-day or next-day funding capability implied by emergency-cash category positioning
Established customer service infrastructure with multiple contact methods (phone and email support)
Online loan options available to supplement in-store services
Operates across multiple states with store locator functionality
Title loans available as collateral-based alternative to unsecured short-term loans
cons: Website 404 errors make it difficult to access specific location and service details
Limited transparency about APR rates, fees, and loan terms visible on provided pages
Service availability varies significantly by state and location (product availability restrictions noted)
Payday and short-term lending products typically carry high costs and debt-cycle risks
No visible information about credit-building features or alternative products for credit improvement
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with physical store access in their area
Customers who prefer in-person financial services over purely online platforms
People requiring check cashing, money transfers, or tax preparation alongside short-term loans
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in urgent need of small-dollar cash who have physical store access and prefer face-to-face transactions. The primary caveat is that short-term lending products like payday and title loans typically carry high APR costs and pose significant debt-cycle risks; consumers should explore alternatives through credit unions or CDFIs before committing to these services.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 6402 S Central Ave, Phoenix, AZ. Quick payday and title loans with same-day service.
